name: Yan Yu
page_title: Yan Yu 嚴輿 [Yan Baihu] – Romance of the Three Kingdoms Encyclopedia – Kongming’s Archives
historical_notes:
Yan Yu was younger brother to White Tiger Yan. In AD 197 Sun Ce attacked and Yan Yu was sent to parlay. They met face-to-face but when Sun Ce drew his blade Yan Yu jumped in fright, and was promptly cut down. Yan Yu had a reputation for bravery so, seeing this, his men became frightened and were quickly defeated. (1)

1) Sanguozhi: Wu 1

full_text:
Yan Yu 嚴輿
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Yan Yu (嚴輿). Killed by an enraged Sun Ce after suggesting that Sun Ce join Yan Baihu. Yan Yu was affiliated with Yan Baihu. Yan Yu lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
